reviews.comment:
Un desastre parece q el restaurant esta abierto de 12 a 12.05 porque siempre q llegó nunca puedo almorzar y en el full no hay nada parece q al dueño le importa un comino dar un buen servicio lo único q se salvan son los playeros que suerte q no soy socio

(Translated by Google)
It seems a disaster that the restaurant is open from 12 to 12:05 because every time I arrive I can never have lunch and there is nothing in the full house it seems that the owner doesn't give a damn about giving good service the only thing that is saved are the beach attendants luckily I'm not a member

reviews.comment:
Baños en buen estado, no hay lugar para estacionar a la sombra. Es un lugar estratégico para cargar nafta antes de agarrar la ruta del desierto. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Restrooms in good condition, no shaded parking. It's a strategic spot to fill up with gas before hitting the desert road. Recommended.

reviews.comment:
ES VERDAD!!!!! cuando llegas te dicen"no hay" o "hay que esperar porque recien llego el camion" y ves que el camionero esta tomando mate del otro lado de la ruta ....jajajajaja, pero si es de mañana podes esperar desayunando muy bien!!!! tengan en cuenta que es la provincia y se manejan otros tiempos......saludos a los viajeros

(Translated by Google)
IT'S TRUE!!!!! When you arrive, they tell you "there isn't any" or "we have to wait because the truck just arrived" and you see that the truck driver is drinking mate on the other side of the road.... hahahahaha, but if it's morning, you can wait and have a very good breakfast!!!! Keep in mind that it's the province and other times are handled...... greetings to travelers
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRZ3J5MVhREAE

reviews.comment:
La peor estacion del ACA que vi. llegas, desde La Pampa" y te dicen: "no hay combustible", preocupado te haces un comentario en voz alta, como preguntandote: "como puede ser, que hago?, y el empleado muy alegremente te dice: "hubiese cargado en la YPF anterior o siga 15km a la próxima", tragas bronca y preguntas: "en la próxima hay combustible?", y te responden: "no se, yo trabajo aquí", mientras tanto ves a tu señora llegar y decirte: "no hay agua caliente, no hay nada en el quiosco, no hay baño para el socio, y las empleadas te dicen que no es un buen horario para comprar porque estan cambiando el turno", genial ACA!.  si seguis camino y pasas por Zapala tenes ahi una estacion ACA que parece salida de otro planeta, excelente todo, hasta le funciona el wifi.

(Translated by Google)
The worst ACA station I've ever seen. You arrive from La Pampa and they tell you, "There's no fuel." Worried, you make a comment out loud, like you're asking yourself, "How can this be? What should I do?" And the employee cheerfully tells you, "You should have filled up at the previous YPF or continue 15 km to the next one." You swallow your anger and ask, "Is there fuel at the next one?" And they reply, "I don't know, I work here." Meanwhile, you see your wife arrive and tell you, "There's no hot water, there's nothing at the kiosk, there's no bathroom for members, and the employees tell you it's not a good time to shop because they're changing shifts." Great job, ACA! If you continue on your way and pass through Zapala, there's an ACA station there that seems like it's from another planet—everything is excellent, even the Wi-Fi works.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMzQ2ME1nEAE
